m	Z	
check_random_state)
sample_without_replacementr
Generate a sparse random matrix given column class distributions
    Parameters
    ----------
    n_samples : int,
        Number of samples to draw in each column.
    classes : list of size n_outputs of arrays of size (n_classes,)
        List of classes for each column.
    class_probability : list of size n_outputs of arrays of         shape (n_classes,), default=None
        Class distribution of each column. If None, uniform distribution is
        assumed.
    random_state : int, RandomState instance or None, default=None
        Controls the randomness of the sampled classes.
        See :term:`Glossary <random_state>`.
    Returns
    -------
    random_matrix : sparse csc matrix of size (n_samples, n_outputs)
    
class dtype %s is not supportedF)
copyN)
shaper
?z2Probability array at index {0} does not sum to onezXclasses[{0}] (length {1}) and class_probability[{0}] (length {2}) have different length.g
n_population
	n_samples
random_state)
size)
